gist.headline: Hizumi joins the chat
gist.blurb: Say hello to Hizumi, a new Discord bot for generating images and video. The hive is growing!
gist.summary: Added Hizumi to the Social Bots showcase, enabling Discord users to generate media via Pollinations.
gist.impact: Discord communities can now utilize Hizumi for integrated image and video creation directly in their servers.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee welcoming a new robot character (Hizumi) into a cozy Discord-themed server room. Hizumi should look like a friendly bot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot high-fiving a new friendly robot character representing Hizumi. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. The bee wears a tiny headset. Chunky retro sprites. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike. Pixel text: 'HIZUMI'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
